name: Peanut Butter Dreams
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the melted margarine and first four ingredients (powdered sugar, Rice Krispies®, and peanut butter). Mix everything together using your hands.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls.
3. Freeze the balls for 1 hour.
4. Melt the chocolate chips and paraffin wax in a double boiler.
5. Dip each ball one at a time into the warm melted chocolate, then place onto a cookie sheet lined with wax paper.
6. Refrigerate until set.
Tip: These treats freeze well.
